headline: VICI Properties Inc. Declares Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: NEW YORK, March 05, 2026--VICI Properties Inc. (NYSE: VICI) ("VICI Properties") announced today that its Board of Directors has declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.45 per share of common stock for the period from January 1, 2026 to March 31, 2026. The dividend will be payable on April 9, 2026 to stockholders of record as of the close of business on March 19, 2026.
